content: Only one file can be uploaded at a time.

comment.text: This key displays a message on a UI element (likely a button or label) to inform users that only a single file can be uploaded. It appears when the uploader is in file upload mode, providing a helpful tooltip for the user. Translators should ensure the meaning and tone accurately convey this limitation.

usage.context:
place="right"
 tooltipContent={
 <Text fontSize="12px">
 {isFolderMode
 ? t("SingleFolderDescription")
 : t("SingleFileDescription")}
 </Text>
 }
 dataTestId="single_help_button"
 />
 </LabelGroup>
